channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Fears Keep Hammering Software Stocks—Even Those Reporting Good Earnings
item.description: IBM and ServiceNow beat earnings expectations, but investors remain pessimistic.

item.title: ‘It was like this little gift that fell in my lap’: Millions of Americans may soon discover they’ve been Canadian all along
item.description: If you have a grandparent, great-grandparent or even more distant ancestor from Canada, you could be Canadian.

item.title: Energy stocks lead 2026 gains. Why Iran war may erode the rally.
Investors are worried over private credit. Why is money flowing into these ETFs?
8 Ways Creators Can Monetize Away From Socials
item.description: The creator economy has matured well past the era of sponsored posts being a creator’s only income stream.

item.title: People living in the U.S. with temporary protected status, targeted by Trump, are a $29 billion economic force
item.description: As the Supreme Court prepares to weigh the fate of TPS for Haitians and Syrians, a new report accounts for a demographic’s economic impact.

item.title: Meta, Microsoft look to trim workforces amid heavy AI spending
item.description: Meta told personnel in an internal memo on Thursday that it planned to cut 10% of workers.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Friday, April 24 Clues And Answers (#1,048)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.

item.title: AI Is Coming For The Design Stack
item.description: AI is stepping directly into the design game with new models and product releases that target design processes and tools directly.

item.title: Stocks off session lows in final hour, but tech-heavy Nasdaq leads declines
Pope Leo says he carries a photo of a slain Muslim boy in his pocket: ‘I cannot be in favor of war’
item.description: Leo also suggested that the U.S. church is excessively focused on sex.

item.title: ‘Godmother of Silicon Valley’ Esther Wojcicki, mother of the YouTube and 23andMe CEOs, shares her secret to raising future leaders
item.description: Wojcicki takes inspiration from her daughters’ public failures and how they pivoted to turn mistakes into successful companies.

item.title: U.S. inflation picture hasn’t been this bleak in nearly four years
ServiceNow’s stock sinks, taking the software sector down with it
After Earth Day, Understand The Transit Compromise To Grasp Efficiency
item.description: It's counter-intuitive, but smaller, van-sized vehicles can make more energy-efficient transit than buses and trains, because better service means les...

item.title: Bessent torches Democrat's ‘sanctions relief’ claims, calls $14B Iran/Russia charge a DNC talking point
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Chris Coons clash over claims that Iran gained $14 billion from temporary U.S. sanctions relief on oil.

item.title: How does Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh view the central bank's inflation goal?
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is testifying before the Senate Banking Committee and has previously signaled support for a range-based approach to infl...

item.title: Trump says he wants 'somebody' to buy Spirit Airlines, opposes United-American merger
item.description: President Donald Trump says he wants someone to buy Spirit Airlines as the low-cost carrier battles bankruptcy and rising fuel costs threaten its reco...

item.title: DOJ reportedly pursuing criminal antitrust probe of major meatpacking companies
item.description: The DOJ is reportedly investigating four major beef companies in a criminal antitrust probe after Trump claimed meatpackers manipulated cattle prices.

item.title: Who is Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair?
item.description: President Donald Trump nominated former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh at the end of January to become chairman of the central bank.
